selections.name: Lady Lyla
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed in this field. The pace advantage gives her a significant boost to dictate terms.

selections.name: Winning Shot
selections.reason: Consistent presser who will get a great trip tracking the lone speed. Strong class metrics.

selections.name: Curlina Star
selections.reason: Classy filly but speed figures are capped due to disparity. Will need pace help to close effectively.

selections.name: New Centsation
selections.reason: Mid-pack runner who can pick up pieces if the top choices falter late.

danger_horse.name: Mor Miss Mojo
danger_horse.reason: Late closer who could hit the board if the pace is surprisingly hot.

selections.name: If I Were You
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field and projects a perfect pressing trip behind a contested pace.

selections.name: Tony B
selections.reason: Strong sustained closer who will benefit from the expected early duel between Centerfold Guy and Lake Chapala.

selections.name: Lake Chapala
selections.reason: Has early speed but may get caught in a duel. Still dangerous if he clears early.

selections.name: Garrincha
selections.reason: Late runner who should pass tired horses in the stretch for a minor share.

danger_horse.name: Centerfold Guy
danger_horse.reason: Early speed drawn inside; if he puts away the outside pressure, he could wire the field.

selections.name: Bottle Rocket (fr)
selections.reason: Class standout dropping in. Should get a perfect inside stalking trip behind the early speed.

selections.name: Classy Disposition
selections.reason: Expected to contest the pace. Has the class to hold on for a major share even if pressured.

selections.name: Lady Dominance
selections.reason: Presser who will benefit from the pace scenario and gets a positive setup.

selections.name: Viking Queen
selections.reason: Solid closer who can pick up the pieces late if the pace collapses.

danger_horse.name: Calendula
danger_horse.reason: Early speed threat who could prove stubborn if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Dancing Bill
selections.reason: Pace meltdown scenario heavily favors this closer. With 3+ early speed types, he gets a massive setup.

selections.name: Coercive
selections.reason: Classy presser drawn inside. Can sit just off the hot pace and make first run.

selections.name: Chequera
selections.reason: Another closer who gets a significant pace upgrade due to the projected duel up front.

selections.name: Vino's Valentine
selections.reason: The best of the early speed horses, but penalized due to the expected contested pace.

danger_horse.name: Messi The Great
danger_horse.reason: Dangerous early speed, but wide draw and pace pressure make him vulnerable late.

selections.name: Bahamian Moon
selections.reason: Perfectly positioned presser who avoids the turf speed penalty. High class rating makes him the top choice.

selections.name: Smithwick's Spice
selections.reason: Elite raw speed figures, but takes a slight penalty as a pure early type on turf facing pressure.

selections.name: Rocket Dragon
selections.reason: Solid presser who will be picking up the pieces late. Good class foundation.

selections.name: Hector
selections.reason: Sustained closer who will benefit if the front runners duel too hard.

danger_horse.name: Hope In Him
danger_horse.reason: Early speed threat who could wire the field if Smithwick's Spice misses the break.

selections.name: Tour Queen
selections.reason: Presser who sits the perfect trip behind a projected 3-horse pace meltdown. Classy and ready.

selections.name: Gridlock
selections.reason: Sustained closer drawn the rail. Gets a massive pace upgrade due to the contested early speed.

selections.name: It's Goodtobe Jose
selections.reason: Another presser who will benefit from the hot pace. Consistent and dangerous.

selections.name: Retired Kathy
selections.reason: The classiest of the early speed types, but penalized heavily for the expected duel.

danger_horse.name: Factorbella
danger_horse.reason: Brilliant early speed, but the pace scenario is against her today.

selections.name: Duchessa
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed on turf. The pace advantage offsets the turf speed penalty.

selections.name: Parlaypauline
selections.reason: Presser drawn well inside. Will get first run at the lone speed.

selections.name: Greatest
selections.reason: Solid closer but takes a pace penalty due to the lack of early speed in the race.

selections.name: Bakers Island
selections.reason: Classy closer who will need a masterful ride to overcome the slow pace scenario.

danger_horse.name: La Rodada
danger_horse.reason: Presser who could inherit the lead if Duchessa falters.

selections.name: Pando
selections.reason: Lone early speed in this field. Gets a massive +5 pace bonus and should control the race from the start.

selections.name: Jades Jay
selections.reason: Classy presser who will track Pando. The most likely winner if the top choice tires.

selections.name: Tiz A Beast
selections.reason: Inside draw and pressing style gives him a great chance to hit the board.

selections.name: Awesome Fantasy
selections.reason: Closer who is penalized by the slow pace but has enough class to grab a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Anchises
danger_horse.reason: Late runner who could surprise if the pace is faster than projected.

selections.name: Miami Style
selections.reason: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Massive class advantage over this scratched-down field. Perfect pressing style.

selections.name: Whiskey Whim
selections.reason: Solid presser who should get a great trip. Clear second best on paper.

selections.name: Kathleen's Derby
selections.reason: Inside draw and pressing style makes her a strong candidate for the exotics.

selections.name: Chefeta
selections.reason: Lone early speed gets a pace upgrade, but class is a question mark late.

danger_horse.name: Melody Factor
danger_horse.reason: Closer who could pick up pieces if the front runners tire.
